overview: Aurora's Scientific and Technological Institute at Aushapur, Ghatkesar, was established in 2003 as Church Institute of Technology under Church Educational Society and later renamed ASTI. The official site positions it as a long-running JNTUH-affiliated engineering campus on the Warangal Highway with a calm, residential learning environment.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTUH; established by Church Educational Society.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - CSE, CSE (AI and ML), ECE, Mechanical Engineering
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Rs. 50,800/year tuition plus special fee of Rs. 5,500 in first year and Rs. 2,500 in later years

admissions.admissionProcess: The official undergraduate admissions page states that admissions are through EAMCET counseling based on rank and 10+2 eligibility.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET schedules are notified by TSCHE each cycle; ASTI publishes admission forms and fee details on its website.

campus.specialNote: The institute was originally launched as Church Institute of Technology and continues to operate from Aushapur on the Warangal Highway.

contact.address: Aushapur (V), Ghatkesar (M), Medchal District - 501301, Telangana, India
